Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class BotInvocationMapping

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.BotInvocationMapping
public class BotInvocationMapping extends Object

Java class for BotInvocationMapping complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="BotInvocationMapping">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="parameterName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="recordName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}BotInvocationMappingType"/>
         <element name="value" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="variableName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="variableType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationVariableType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
